name: Spiced Gooseberries (Old)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the gooseberries and remove stems.
2. Combine the brown sugar and vinegar in a saucepan.
3. Tie the cinnamon and ground cloves in a small bag.
4. Add the spice bag to the syrup mixture.
5. Bring the liquid to a boil over medium heat.
6. Carefully add the berries to the boiling syrup.
7. Reduce heat and simmer for 20-30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
8. Pack hot jars with the cooked gooseberries and seal.
Luella Mosheir
Lowville, N.Y.
